data.title: Why AudioEye (AEYE) Stock Is Getting Hammered
data.description: AudioEye shares are trading lower by 19.4% Thursday afternoon. The company announced a secondary offering of up to 1.25 million shares.

data.title: What's Going On With Jumia Shares Thursday
data.description: Jumia shares are trading higher on Thursday after the company announced a year-over-year increase in orders and gross merchant value for the two months ended Nov. 30.
